# Tim Salvador

> Security leader with deep roots in detection engineering, incident response, and adversary emulation across multiple industries. Specializing in Security Operations, Threat Intelligence, and cloud security.

Tim Salvador is a cybersecurity leader based in Chicago, IL with 15+ years of experience across 6 enterprise organizations spanning manufacturing, pharmaceutical, e-commerce, industrial AI/SaaS, and managed IT services. Open to senior leadership or IC roles. He holds an OSCP (Offensive Security, 2023) and GCFA (GIAC, 2020). He has built 100+ custom detections across SIEM platforms and has held roles ranging from hands-on security analyst to senior security management.

## What Tim Does

- Security Operations and SOC leadership
- Incident Response and digital forensics
- Threat Intelligence and adversary profiling
- Adversary Emulation, Red/Blue/Green team operations, and penetration testing
- Cloud security across AWS, GCP, and Azure
- Detection engineering and SIEM automation (Splunk, Elastic, Chronicle, InsightIDR)
- Security program strategy, team building, and executive communication

## Key Achievements

- 80%+ noise reduction through custom SIEM detection rules and automation
- Sub-4-hour containment on ransomware, credential theft, and DDoS incidents with zero data exfiltration
- Reduced MTTR by 25-40% across multiple enterprise environments
- 100% ISO 27001 and NIST compliance at Groupon
- Migrated on-premises security stack to cloud-native platforms, reducing costs by 80%
- Mentored analysts to senior roles and management across multiple organizations

## Career History

- Incident Responder Manager, Illinois Tool Works Inc. (04/2024 - 10/2024)
- Senior Information Security Manager II, Groupon Inc. (03/2020 - 07/2023)
- Sr Security Analyst III, CSIRT, AbbVie Inc. (08/2018 - 02/2020)
- Threat Exposure Manager, Uptake Inc. (06/2015 - 06/2018)
- Security Analyst, Cleverbridge Inc. (06/2010 - 06/2015)
- Network Engineer, OnShore Networks Inc. (2008 - 2010)

## Education

- Master of Science, Computer, Information and Network Security, DePaul University (2012)
- Bachelor of Science, Telecommunications and Network Management, DeVry University (2006)

## Certifications

- Offensive Security Certified Professional (OSCP), Offensive Security, 2023
- GIAC Certified Forensic Analyst (GCFA), GIAC, 2020
